roadmap.title: Onboarding and Phase 1
roadmap.description: Finish onboarding, establish the first factory, and complete Space Elevator Phase 1. Pick up nearby flora, artifacts, and a Power Slug while the map is still small, and begin feeding spare production into the AWESOME Sink.

roadmap.title: Tiers 3–4 and Phase 2
roadmap.description: Expand power, fluids, belts, vehicles, and MAM research through Phase 2. Use this period for the short movement experiments, all three slug and food types, a world tape, and visits to every starting biome.

roadmap.title: Tiers 5–6 and Phase 3
roadmap.description: Reach trains and Manufacturers, finish Phase 3, and turn the transport network into several quick unlocks. Stronger traversal also makes the Manta, highest cliff, and world-height tasks practical.

roadmap.title: Tiers 7–8, Phase 4, and world sweep
roadmap.description: Complete Phase 4 and every MAM tree, then use late-game mobility and scanning for the large Mercer Sphere, Somersloop, and Hard Drive totals. In co-op, the player who needs a pickup achievement should collect each artifact personally.

roadmap.title: Tier 9, Phase 5, and post-game grind
roadmap.description: Unlock the remaining HUB Milestones, finish the game, and close the long counters. Keep excess high-tier production flowing into the Sink until the 1,000-Coupon Golden Nut is affordable.

achievements.summary: Reach 5,000 total @mechanic{Foundation placements}; dismantled pieces still count.

guide.context: This cumulative build counter is best left running throughout the factory expansion, with a short cleanup only if normal construction falls short.

steps.text: Use @item{Foundations} freely for factory floors, roads, and transport supports.
For cleanup, lay large grids until the 5,000th placement registers.
steps.note: You may dismantle completed grids; prior placements stay on the counter.

achievements.summary: Construct the @item{Space Elevator} after Tier 0 using 500 Concrete, 250 Iron Plates, 400 Iron Rods, and 1,500 Wire.

guide.context: The Elevator is the hub for Project Assembly and gates every later phase.

steps.text: Finish @mechanic{Tier 0 - HUB Upgrade 6} to unlock the @item{Space Elevator}.
Carry 500 @item{Concrete}, 250 @item{Iron Plates}, 400 @item{Iron Rods}, and 1,500 @item{Wire}.
Select @item{Space Elevator} in the build menu and place its anchor on a clear site; construction triggers the achievement.

achievements.summary: Unlock @mechanic{Industrial Manufacturing} in Tier 6 and place one @item{Manufacturer}.

guide.context: This becomes available through normal Tier 6 Milestone progress.

steps.text: Complete @mechanic{Industrial Manufacturing}, then build a @item{Manufacturer}.

achievements.summary: Finish every node across all permanent @item{MAM} research trees.

guide.context: Most branches fill naturally as new materials appear; reserve a late-game pass for resources or samples you skipped.

steps.text: Open each @item{MAM} tree and identify every unfinished node.
Move each node's displayed cost into your character inventory; items stored only in the @mechanic{Dimensional Depot} do not satisfy MAM research.
Select each unfinished node and press @mechanic{Research}; the MAM shows 100% when a tree is complete. Finish every permanent tree to trigger the achievement.

achievements.summary: Clear every node in one @item{MAM} tree; Nutrients or Power Slugs are convenient first choices.

guide.context: Choose a compact branch whose materials you already encounter during exploration.

steps.text: Focus on either the @mechanic{Nutrients} or @mechanic{Power Slugs} tree.
Research every node in that single tree.

achievements.description: Complete Phase 1 of the Space Elevator.
achievements.summary: Send 50 Smart Plating through the @item{Space Elevator} for Project Assembly Phase 1.

guide.context: This is the first major progression gate after building the Elevator.

steps.text: Produce 50 @item{Smart Plating} and load all 50 into the @item{Space Elevator}.
Open the Elevator display and pull its handle twice through @mechanic{Load}, @mechanic{Seal}, and @mechanic{Send}; the Phase 1 launch triggers the achievement and unlocks Tiers 3-4.
In co-op, stay online for the launch if you need the achievement.
steps.note: One-time progression is not awarded retroactively.

achievements.description: Complete Phase 2 of the Space Elevator.
achievements.summary: For Phase 2, send 100 Automated Wiring plus 1,000 each of Versatile Framework and Smart Plating.

guide.context: Expand the Phase 2 production chains, then send the completed parts together.

steps.text: Load 100 @item{Automated Wiring} into the Elevator, followed by 1,000 @item{Versatile Framework} and 1,000 @item{Smart Plating}.
At the Elevator display, pull the handle through @mechanic{Load}, @mechanic{Seal}, and @mechanic{Send}; the launch triggers the achievement and unlocks Tiers 5-6.
Co-op players who need credit should be present for the launch.

achievements.description: Complete Phase 3 of the Space Elevator.
achievements.summary: Send 2,500 Versatile Framework, 500 Modular Engines, and 100 Adaptive Control Units for Phase 3.

guide.context: Phase 3 asks for broader multi-part automation than the early game.

steps.text: Produce and load 2,500 @item{Versatile Framework}, 500 @item{Modular Engines}, and 100 @item{Adaptive Control Units}.
At the Elevator display, pull the handle through @mechanic{Load}, @mechanic{Seal}, and @mechanic{Send}; the launch triggers the achievement and unlocks Tiers 7-8.
Remain in-session for a co-op launch if you need the unlock.

achievements.description: Complete Phase 4 of the Space Elevator.
achievements.summary: Send the four Phase 4 Project Parts through the @item{Space Elevator} to unlock Tier 9.

guide.context: Treat this as a late-game factory project: automate the complex inputs and let storage accumulate before launch.

steps.text: Produce and load 500 @item{Assembly Director Systems}, 500 @item{Magnetic Field Generators}, 250 @item{Thermal Propulsion Rockets}, and 100 @item{Nuclear Pasta}.
At the Elevator display, pull the handle through @mechanic{Load}, @mechanic{Seal}, and @mechanic{Send}; the launch triggers the achievement and unlocks Tier 9.
Be present during a co-op launch to receive one-time progression credit.

achievements.description: Complete Phase 5 of the Space Elevator and finish the game.
achievements.summary: Send the four Phase 5 Project Parts, complete the ending controls, and launch Project Assembly.

guide.context: This closes the main progression but does not end access to the world, so remaining counters can be cleaned up afterward.

steps.text: Load 200 @item{Ballistic Warp Drives} and 256 @item{AI Expansion Servers}, then add 1,000 @item{Biochemical Sculptors} and 1,000 @item{Nuclear Pasta}.
Use the @item{Space Elevator} display to complete its ending sequence, then pull the final launch lever; the launch and credits trigger the achievement.
Join the session before a co-op partner launches it if you need the unlock.

achievements.summary: Play through Phase 0 and finish the full @mechanic{Onboarding} sequence.

guide.context: Use a normal fresh save and follow ADA's tutorial objectives through the final Phase 0 task.

steps.text: Complete every @mechanic{Onboarding} objective without skipping Phase 0.
Use unfinished progression if an older save never awarded it.
steps.note: Completed progression is not granted retroactively.

achievements.summary: Buy the @item{Cup} for 1 Coupon, equip it, and take a drink.

guide.context: The Cup is a cheap AWESOME Shop item once Coupon production has begun.

steps.text: Spend 1 @item{Coupon} on the @item{Cup} in the AWESOME Shop.
Equip the Cup and use it once.

achievements.summary: Reveal, purchase, build, and enter the @item{Cyber Wagon} using 21 Coupons total.

guide.context: One Coupon is sacrificed to reveal the vehicle; the blueprint then costs another 20 Coupons.

steps.text: Feed 1 @item{Coupon} into the @item{AWESOME Sink}.
Spend 20 @item{Coupons} on the @item{Cyber Wagon} in the AWESOME Shop.
Construct the vehicle and enter its driver's position.

achievements.description: Avoid touching the ground for 30 minutes.
achievements.summary: Stay off terrain continuously for 30 minutes by using water, a ladder, Jetpack, or Hoverpack.

guide.context: Choose a safe setup where you can remain supported without stepping on natural ground.

steps.text: Enter deep water or hold position on a @item{Ladder}.
Remain off the terrain for an uninterrupted 30 minutes.

achievements.summary: Trip a power grid by overdrawing it, then reset the blown fuse.

guide.context: Use a small grid with no charged Power Storage so demand can exceed production immediately.

steps.text: Connect enough machines to push @mechanic{power consumption} above generation.
Open any @item{Power Pole} or @item{Generator} after the outage, then restore the tripped grid.

achievements.description: Gather all three Power Slug types.
achievements.summary: Personally collect one Power Slug of each color: Blue, Yellow, and Purple.

guide.context: The three colors appear at many points around the world; distant light pillars help reveal them.

collectibles.name: Blue Power Slug
collectibles.method: Reach the glow and pick up the @item{Blue Power Slug} yourself.

collectibles.name: Yellow Power Slug
collectibles.method: Reach the glow and pick up the @item{Yellow Power Slug} yourself.

collectibles.name: Purple Power Slug
collectibles.method: Reach the glow and pick up the @item{Purple Power Slug} yourself.

achievements.description: Gather 100 Hard Drives from Crash Sites.
achievements.summary: Recover 100 @item{Hard Drives} from @loc{Crash Sites}; 118 sites were counted by the researched guide.

guide.context: This is a map-scale collectible sweep. Late-game traversal and Radio Signal Scanning reduce backtracking.

steps.text: Unlock @mechanic{Radio Signal Scanning} in the MAM.
Use the cited interactive map to route unvisited @loc{Crash Sites}.
Open sites and personally take @item{Hard Drives} until the counter reaches 100.

achievements.description: Bounce on a Space Giraffe Tick Penguin Thing.
achievements.summary: @enemy{Space Giraffe-Tick-Penguin-Whale Thing}: land on its back to get bounced.

guide.context: These tall passive creatures roam the world; extra height makes the landing easier.

steps.text: Find one of the roaming @enemy{Space Giraffe-Tick-Penguin-Whale Things}.
Jump or use a @item{Jetpack} to land on its upper body.

achievements.description: Hit a creature with a vehicle.
achievements.summary: Drive any vehicle into a roaming creature.

guide.context: Any drivable vehicle and any creature on its path can trigger this.

steps.text: Accelerate a @item{vehicle} into a nearby @enemy{creature}.

achievements.summary: Accumulate 5 km of placed @item{Conveyor Belts}; every belt tier contributes.

guide.context: Normal factory growth usually completes this without a special route.

steps.text: Connect production with @item{Conveyor Belts} throughout the playthrough.
If needed, build temporary long runs to reach 5 km.
steps.note: Removing a belt does not remove its placement progress.

achievements.summary: Place 5 km total of @item{Pipelines} after fluid logistics opens with Tier 3 Coal Power.

guide.context: Water, oil, and later fluids contribute naturally as the factory expands.

steps.text: Route fluids with any @item{Pipeline} type.
Add temporary pipeline runs if natural construction remains below 5 km.

achievements.summary: Lay 5 km of @item{Railway} after unlocking Tier 6 Monorail Train Technology.

guide.context: A practical long-distance train line can supply most or all of the required length.

steps.text: Complete @mechanic{Monorail Train Technology} in Tier 6.
Build a rail route totaling 5 km.

achievements.description: Find and gather a Boombox tape in the world.
achievements.summary: Collect a @item{Boombox Tape} placed in the world; use a world pickup for reliable credit.

guide.context: The official wiki distinguishes world tapes from Shop purchases, so route to a known overworld tape.

steps.text: Use the cited interactive map to mark a nearby @item{Boombox Tape}.
Travel to its @loc{world location} and pick it up.

achievements.description: Get knocked over by a vehicle.
achievements.summary: Stand in the path of a moving vehicle; an automated route works in solo.

guide.context: No multiplayer partner is required because a recorded vehicle route can supply the driverless impact.

steps.text: Record and enable an @mechanic{automated vehicle route}.
Stand in front of the moving vehicle until it knocks you down.

achievements.summary: Reach the @enemy{Giant Flying Manta}, land on it, and pet it.

guide.context: Build a platform into the Manta's repeated flight path so you can board as it passes.

steps.text: Observe the @enemy{Giant Flying Manta} and extend a structure to its route.
Jump onto the Manta, stay aboard, and interact to pet it.

achievements.description: Gather all three types of edible flora.
achievements.summary: Personally gather the three edible plants: Beryl Nut, Paleberry, and Bacon Agaric.

guide.context: Each food type grows in the world and can be collected during the first exploration loop.

achievements.displayName: I'm sure these play a Critical Role
achievements.summary: Personally collect one @item{Mercer Sphere} from the world.

guide.context: Mercer Spheres are distributed across the map, sometimes behind enemies or awkward terrain.

steps.text: Reach a @loc{Mercer Sphere site} and pick up the @item{Mercer Sphere}.

achievements.summary: Personally collect one @item{Somersloop} in the world.

guide.context: Somersloops sit at fixed world locations that can be guarded or difficult to reach.

steps.text: Reach a @loc{Somersloop site} and take the @item{Somersloop}.

achievements.summary: Personally pick up 150 @item{Mercer Spheres}; the researched guide counted 298 available.

guide.context: The world has far more than the target, so route a dense late-game sweep instead of trying to clear every marker.

steps.text: Filter @item{Mercer Spheres} on the cited interactive map.
Plan a route using your best traversal equipment.
Make each pickup personally until the counter reaches 150.
steps.note: A co-op partner's pickup does not advance your personal total.

achievements.displayName: My skin feels itchy all of a sudden...
achievements.summary: Personally collect 50 @item{Somersloops}; the researched guide counted 106 in the world.

guide.context: Only about half of the available Somersloops are needed, which allows you to skip inconvenient markers.

steps.text: Show @item{Somersloops} on the cited interactive map.
Route accessible clusters with late-game mobility.
Personally gather 50 total.
steps.note: Co-op collection credit belongs to the player who picks up the item.

achievements.summary: Craft a @item{Portable Miner} and deploy it on an ore node.

guide.context: Normal onboarding introduces both the Equipment Workshop and ore-node placement.

steps.text: Use the @loc{Equipment Workshop} to make a @item{Portable Miner}.
Place it directly on any @loc{ore node}.

achievements.summary: Sink spare items for points, then print the first @item{Coupon} from the AWESOME Sink.

guide.context: Coupon generation begins once the Resource Sink Bonus Program provides the AWESOME Sink.

steps.text: After Onboarding, complete the Tier 2 @mechanic{Resource Sink Bonus Program} Milestone, then build an @item{AWESOME Sink}.
Feed sinkable materials into the Sink until its display shows at least one Coupon ready.
Open the Sink interface and press @mechanic{Print Coupon}; collecting the first printed @item{Coupon} triggers the achievement.

achievements.description: Buy the Golden Nut Statue from the AWESOME Shop.
achievements.summary: Save 1,000 @item{Coupons} and personally buy the @item{Golden Nut Statue}.

guide.context: Coupon prices rise over time, making this the long-tail completion grind. Sink excess high-tier production throughout the entire save.

steps.text: Keep spare factory output flowing into one or more @item{AWESOME Sinks}.
Accumulate 1,000 printed @item{Coupons} in your inventory.
Spend the Coupons yourself on the AWESOME Shop's @item{Golden Nut Statue}.
steps.note: A co-op partner's purchase does not award your achievement.

achievements.description: Reach the highest cliff in the world.
achievements.summary: Reach the @loc{Rocky Desert mountain} beside the impure Uranium Resource Node.

guide.context: The researched guide identifies this mountain as the highest natural cliff; late-game traversal reduces the climb.

steps.text: Travel to the @loc{Rocky Desert mountain} near the impure Uranium Resource Node.
Climb or build to the mountain's highest cliff point.

achievements.summary: Link two @item{Train Stations} and save a timetable between them.

guide.context: The timetable needs two valid destinations on a connected rail network.

steps.text: Build two connected @item{Train Stations} and place a train.
Add both stations to the train's timetable and save it.

achievements.description: Survive a fall on 1 health point.
achievements.summary: Tune a controlled fall so the landing leaves exactly 1 HP.

guide.context: Use a repeatable ladder or tower setup so you can adjust the drop height between attempts.

steps.text: Begin at full health and build a tall @item{Ladder} or tower.
Drop onto safe terrain and check the remaining health.
Adjust the height in small increments until the fall leaves exactly 1 HP.

achievements.summary: Offer a @item{Paleberry} to a @enemy{Lizard Doggo}, then pet it after it approaches.

guide.context: Bring a Paleberry when exploring and approach the creature without startling it.

steps.text: Drop one @item{Paleberry} on the ground near a @enemy{Lizard Doggo}.
Let the Doggo come to the berry, then interact to pet and tame it.

achievements.summary: Exceed 140 km/h with a downhill train, Hypertube cannon, or Zipline momentum.

guide.context: A train on a long descent is the most direct late-game setup from the researched methods.

steps.text: Build a long downhill @item{Railway} and place a train.
Accelerate down the slope until speed passes 140 km/h.
A @mechanic{Hypertube cannon} or Zipline momentum can substitute.

achievements.summary: Let the @item{MAM} analyze a @item{Hard Drive}, then accept any @mechanic{alternate recipe} result.

guide.context: Any Crash Site Hard Drive and any offered alternate recipe will work.

steps.text: Recover a @item{Hard Drive} from a @loc{Crash Site}.
Scan it in the @item{MAM}.
Select one @mechanic{alternate recipe} from the completed scan.

achievements.summary: Pick up any Blue, Yellow, or Purple @item{Power Slug}.

guide.context: Power Slugs cast a visible light pillar that makes them easy to notice while exploring.

steps.text: Follow a Slug's glow, reach its position, and collect it.

achievements.summary: Build upward with ladders or other structures until the map's altitude ceiling triggers.

guide.context: Use a direct construction climb; the older HUB Freighter ride has a report of no longer reaching the trigger.

steps.text: Bring ample materials and stack @item{Ladders} vertically.
Climb and continue extending upward until the achievement appears.
Do not rely on the @item{HUB Freighter} ride as the primary method.

achievements.summary: Complete every HUB Milestone in Tiers 1 through 9 after finishing Tier 0 Onboarding.

guide.context: Clear Milestones as their ingredients enter production, then perform a final Tier-by-Tier audit near the end.

steps.text: Open the @loc{HUB Terminal} and complete available Milestones throughout progression.
Complete Space Elevator Phases 1-4 to open Tiers 3-9, then inspect Tiers 1 through 9 in the HUB Terminal and finish every remaining Milestone.
Be present when the final Milestone completes in co-op.

achievements.summary: Harvest or cut down a cumulative 1,000 plants.

guide.context: Manual gathering begins the counter, while a Chainsaw clears dense areas much faster.

steps.text: Unlock and equip the @item{Chainsaw}.
Clear dense vegetation until 1,000 foliage objects have been destroyed.

achievements.description: Visit each starting area biome once.
achievements.summary: Register all four starts: @loc{Grass Fields} plus @loc{Rocky Desert}, then @loc{Northern Forest} and @loc{Dune Desert}.

guide.context: The four starting regions share one connected world. The earlier non-English tracking issue was fixed before version 1.2.

collectibles.name: Grass Fields
collectibles.method: Travel into the starting-area region until it registers.

collectibles.name: Rocky Desert
collectibles.method: Travel into the starting-area region until it registers.

collectibles.name: Northern Forest
collectibles.method: Travel into the starting-area region until it registers.

collectibles.name: Dune Desert
collectibles.method: Travel into the starting-area region until it registers.
